title: Nordson: A Solid Company With A Strong Breakout
text: Nordson Corporation recently announced strong Q4 FY23 and FY23 results, with sales growth and improved gross margin. The company is expecting FY24 sales to be around 6.5% higher than FY23 sales, with potential recovery in the semiconductor industry. NDSN's stock price has given a solid breakout and its valuation looks reasonable, making it a potential buy.

title: FLS vs. NDSN: Which Stock Is the Better Value Option?
text: Investors interested in Manufacturing - General Industrial stocks are likely familiar with Flowserve (FLS) and Nordson (NDSN). But which of these two stocks is more attractive to value investors?

title: Nordson (NDSN) Q4 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Rise Y/Y
text: Nordson's (NDSN) fourth-quarter fiscal 2023 revenues increase 5.2% due to strong momentum in the Industrial Precision Solutions segment.

title: Nordson (NDSN) Q4 Earnings: Taking a Look at Key Metrics Versus Estimates
text: While the top- and bottom-line numbers for Nordson (NDSN) give a sense of how the business performed in the quarter ended October 2023, it could be worth looking at how some of its key metrics compare to Wall Street estimates and year-ago values.

title: Nordson Corporation Reports Fourth Quarter and Record Fiscal Year 2023 Results
text: WESTLAKE, Ohio--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Nordson Corporation (Nasdaq: NDSN) today reported results for the fiscal fourth quarter ended October 31, 2023. Sales were $719 million, a 5% increase compared to the prior year's fourth quarter sales of $684 million. The increase in fourth quarter 2023 sales included the favorable 7% impact of acquisitions and favorable currency translation of 1%, offset by an organic decrease of 3%. title: Nordson Corporation Declares First Quarter Dividend for Fiscal Year 2024
text: WESTLAKE, Ohio--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Nordson Corporation (Nasdaq: NDSN) today announced that its board of directors declared a fiscal year 2024 first quarter cash dividend in the amount of $0.68 per common share, payable on January 2, 2024 to shareholders of record as of the close of business on December 19, 2023.
